productDisplayName: Enroute Men Leather Black Casual Shoes
description: Indulge in the luxury of pure leather with this pair of shoes from enroute. In a classic silhouette and with ample cushioning, this loafer makes for a fabulous addition to your wardrobe. Upper Full grain leather upper with a midfoot velcro strap for a custom Fit Mildly padded tongue, collar and footbed with a fabric lining for all-day comfort and impact protection Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Outsole Durable grippy rubber outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
